节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The util module provides common utility functions, such as TextEncoder and TextDecoder for string encoding and decoding, RationalNumber8+ for rational number operations, LRUCache9+ for cache management, ScopeHelper9+ for range determination, Base64Helper9+ for Base64 encoding and decoding, types8+ for built-in object type check, and Aspect11+ for instrumentation and replacement on methods.

%s: String will be used to convert all values except BigInt, Object and -0. BigInt values will be represented with an n and Objects that have no user defined toString function are inspected using util.inspect() with options { depth: 0, colors: false, compact: 3 }. %d: Number will be used to convert all values except BigInt and Symbol. %i: parseInt(value, 10) is used for all values except BigInt and Symbol. %f: parseFloat(value) is used for all values except Bigint and Symbol. %j: JSON. Replaced with the string '[Circular]' if the argument contains circular references. %o: Object. A string representation of an object with generic JavaScript object formatting.Similar to util.inspect() with options { showHidden: true, showProxy: true}. This will show the full object including non-enumerable properties and proxies. %O: Object. A string representation of an object with generic JavaScript object formatting. %O: Object. A string representation of an object with generic JavaScript object formatting.Similar to util.inspect() without options. This will show the full object not including non-enumerable properties and proxies. %c: CSS. This specifier is ignored and will skip any CSS passed in. %%: single percent sign ('%'). This does not consume an argument.Returns: <string> The formatted string.
注释信息: @param { Object[] } args - Data to be formatted
@returns { string } Return the character string formatted in a specific format
节点.return_description: Return the character string formatted in a specific format

节点.功能描述: Formats a string by replacing the placeholders in it. %s: String will be used to convert all values except BigInt, Object and -0. BigInt values will be represented with an n and Objects that have no user defined toString function are inspected using util.inspect() with options { depth: 0, colors: false, compact: 3 }. %d: Number will be used to convert all values except BigInt and Symbol. %i: parseInt(value, 10) is used for all values except BigInt and Symbol. %f: parseFloat(value) is used for all values except Bigint and Symbol. %j: JSON. Replaced with the string '[Circular]' if the argument contains circular references. %o: Object. A string representation of an object with generic JavaScript object formatting.Similar to util.inspect() with options { showHidden: true, showProxy: true}. This will show the full object including non-enumerable properties and proxies. %O: Object. A string representation of an object with generic JavaScript object formatting. %O: Object. A string representation of an object with generic JavaScript object formatting.Similar to util.inspect() without options. This will show the full object not including non-enumerable properties and proxies. %c: CSS. This specifier is ignored and will skip any CSS passed in. %%: single percent sign ('%'). This does not consume an argument.Returns: <string> The formatted string. position and format of the arguments to be inserted. argument is returned by default. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Calls back an asynchronous function. In the callback, the first parameter indicates the cause of the rejection (the value is null if the promise has been resolved), and the second parameter indicates the resolved value. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
节点.return_description: Return a Asynchronous function

节点.功能描述: Processes an asynchronous function and returns a promise. (the value is null if the promise has been resolved) and the second parameter value indicates the resolved value. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { function } original - Function, in which the first parameter err indicates the cause of the rejection
@returns { Function } Return a function that returns promises

parameters.说明: Function, in which the first parameter err indicates the cause of the rejection

节点.return_description: Return a function that returns promises

节点.功能描述: Takes a function following the common error-first callback style, i.e taking an (err, value) => callback as the last argument, and return a version that returns promises.
注释信息: @returns { Object } Return a version that returns promises
节点.return_description: Return a version that returns promises

节点.功能描述: Uses a secure random number generator to generate a random universally unique identifier (UUID) of the string type in RFC 4122 version 4.
注释信息: @param { boolean } [entropyCache] - Whether to generate the UUID with using the cache. Default: true.
@returns { string } Return a string representing this UUID.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: boolean } [entropyCache] - Whether to generate the UUID with using the cache. Default: true.

节点.return_description: Return a string representing this UUID.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Uses a secure random number generator to generate a random UUID of the Uint8Array type in RFC 4122 version 4.

@returns { Uint8Array } Return a Uint8Array representing this UUID.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: boolean } [entropyCache] - Whether to generate the UUID with using the cache. Default: true.

节点.return_description: Return a Uint8Array representing this UUID.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Converts a UUID of the string type generated by generateRandomUUID to a UUID of the Uint8Array type generated by generateRandomBinaryUUID, as described in RFC 4122 version 4.
注释信息: @param { string } uuid - String that specifies a UUID
@returns { Uint8Array } Return a Uint8Array representing this UUID. Throw SyntaxError if parsing fails.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.
节点.return_description: Return a Uint8Array representing this UUID. Throw SyntaxError if parsing fails.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the hash value of an object. If no hash value has been obtained, a random hash value is generated saved to the hash field of the object, and returned. If a hash value has been obtained, the hash value saved in the hash field is returned (the same value is returned for the same object). 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { object } [object] - Object whose hash value is to be obtained.
@returns { number } Return a hash code of an object.

parameters.说明: object } [object] - Object whose hash value is to be obtained.

节点.return_description: Return a hash code of an object.

节点.功能描述: Describes decoding-related options, which include fatal and ignoreBOM.
Whether to display fatal errors. The value true means to display fatal errors, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.
Whether to ignore the BOM. The value true means to ignore the BOM, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.
Defines the decode with stream related options parameters.
Does the call follow additional data blocks. The default value is false.
Defines options for streaming decoding to string output.
Stream option controls stream processing in decoding. The default value is false.
Provides APIs to decode byte arrays into strings. It supports multiple formats, including UTF-8, UTF-16LE, UTF-16BE, ISO-8859, and Windows-1251.
A constructor used to create a TextDecoder object.
The source encoding's name, lowercased.
Returns `true` if error mode is "fatal", and `false` otherwise.
Returns `true` if ignore BOM flag is set, and `false` otherwise.
The textDecoder constructor.
Creates a TextDecoder object. It provides the same function as the deprecated argument constructor.
注释信息: @param { string } [encoding] - Encoding format. The default format is 'utf-8'.
@param { TextDecoderOptions } [options] - Decoding-related options, which include fatal and ignoreBOM.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: TextDecoderOptions } [options] - Decoding-related options, which include fatal and ignoreBOM.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Decodes the input and returns a string. If options.stream is true, any incomplete byte sequences occurring at the end of the input are buffered internally and emitted after the next call to textDecoder.decode(). If textDecoder.fatal is true, decoding errors that occur will result in a TypeError being thrown. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: The rational number is mainly to compare rational numbers and obtain the numerator and denominator.
A constructor used to create a RationalNumber instance with a given numerator and denominator.
A constructor used to create a RationalNumber object.

Create a RationalNumber instance with a given numerator and denominator. The numerator and denominator parameters must be integers. If a decimal number is passed in, the function is not intercepted, but the error message "parseRationalNumber: The type of Parameter must be integer" is displayed. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { number } numerator - Numerator, which is an integer.
@param { number } denominator - Denominator, which is an integer.

节点.功能描述: Creates a RationalNumber object based on the given string. The rationalString parameter must be a string. If a decimal string is passed in, the function is not intercepted, but the error message "createRationalFromString: The type of Parameter must be integer string" is displayed.

parameters.说明: String used to create the RationalNumber object.

节点.return_description: Returns a RationalNumber object generated based on the given string.

节点.功能描述: Provides APIs to discard the least recently used data to make rooms for new elements when the cache is full. This class uses the Least Recently Used (LRU) algorithm, which believes that the recently used data may be accessed again in the near future and the least accessed data is the least valuable data and should be removed from the cache.
A constructor used to create a LRUCache instance. The default capacity of the cache is 64.
注释信息: @param { number } [capacity] - Capacity of the cache to create. The default value is 64.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: number } [capacity] - Capacity of the cache to create. The default value is 64.

注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the current buffer contains no value.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the current buffer contains no value.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of a key. If the key is not in the cache, createDefault is called to create the key. If the value specified in createDefault is not undefined, afterRemoval is called to return the value specified in createDefault. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { K } key - Indicates the key to query.
@returns { V | undefined } Returns the value associated with the key if the specified key is present in the buffer; returns null otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns the value associated with the key if the specified key is present in the buffer; returns null otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Adds a key-value pair to this cache and returns the value associated with the key. If the total number of values in the cache is greater than the specified capacity, the deletion operation is performed. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { K } key - Indicates the key to add.
@param { V } value - Indicates the value associated with the key to add.
@returns { V } Returns the value associated with the added key; returns the original value if the key to add already exists.

parameters.说明: Indicates the value associated with the key to add.

节点.return_description: Returns the value associated with the added key; returns the original value if the key to add already exists.

节点.功能描述: Obtains all values in this cache, listed from the most to the least recently accessed.
注释信息: @returns { V[] } Returns the list of all values in the current buffer in ascending order, from the most recently accessed to least recently accessed.
节点.return_description: Returns the list of all values in the current buffer in ascending order, from the most recently accessed to least recently accessed.

节点.功能描述: Obtains all keys in this cache, listed from the most to the least recently accessed. since 9
注释信息: @returns { K[] } Returns a list of keys sorted from most recently accessed to least recently accessed.
节点.return_description: Returns a list of keys sorted from most recently accessed to least recently accessed.

节点.功能描述: Removes a key and its associated value from this cache and returns the value associated with the key. If the key does not exist, undefined is returned. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @returns { V | undefined } Returns an Optional object containing the deleted key-value pair; returns an empty Optional object if the key does not exist.
节点.return_description: Returns an Optional object containing the deleted key-value pair; returns an empty Optional object if the key does not exist.

节点.功能描述: Performs subsequent operations after a value is removed. and the parameter value is false in other cases. method is called and the key to add already exists. The parameter value is null in other cases. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { boolean } isEvict - The parameter value is true if this method is called due to insufficient capacity,
@param { K } key - Indicates the deleted key.
@param { V } value - Indicates the deleted value.
@param { V } newValue - The parameter value is the new value associated if the put(java.lang.Object,java.lang.Object)

parameters.说明: The parameter value is true if this method is called due to insufficient capacity,
The parameter value is the new value associated if the put(java.lang.Object,java.lang.Object)

@returns { V } Returns the value associated with the key.

The value indicates that the encoding format of base64 is MIME_URL_SAFE

节点.功能描述: Encodes the input content into a string. This API returns the result synchronously. - util.Type.BASIC (default): Base64 encoding. The return value does not contain carriage return characters or newline characters. - util.Type.MIME: Base64 encoding. Each line of the return value contains a maximum of 76 characters and ends with '\r\n'. - util.Type.BASIC_URL_SAFE: Base64URL encoding. The return value does not contain carriage return characters or newline characters. - util.Type.MIME_URL_SAFE: Base64URL encoding. 节点.return_description: Returns true if the value is a regular expression object.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the input value is of the Set type.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the input value is of the SetIterator type.

节点.return_description: Returns true if the value is an iterator returned for a built-in Set instance.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the input value is of the SharedArrayBuffer type. Usually, it is desirable to test for both; See isAnyArrayBuffer() for that.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the value is a built-in SharedArrayBuffer instance. This does not include ArrayBuffer instances.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the value is a built-in SharedArrayBuffer instance. This does not include ArrayBuffer instances.

节点.功能描述: Check whether the entered value is a string object type.
注释信息: @param { Object } value - A String object value
@returns { boolean } Returns true if the value is a string object, e.g. created by new String().
节点.return_description: Returns true if the value is a string object, e.g. created by new String().

节点.功能描述: Check whether the entered value is a symbol object type.

@returns { boolean } Returns true if the value is a symbol object, created by calling Object() on a Symbol primitive.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the value is a symbol object, created by calling Object() on a Symbol primitive.

节点.功能描述: Insert before/after logic into a class method or replace implementation for a class method.

Inserts a function before a method of a class object. The inserted function is executed in prior to the original method of the class object. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } methodName - Name of the method. Read-only methods are not supported.
@param { boolean } isStatic - Whether the method is a static method.

parameters.说明: Name of the method. Read-only methods are not supported.
Whether the method is a static method.

节点.功能描述: Inserts a function after a method of a class object. The final return value is the return value of the function inserted. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } methodName - Name of the method. Read-only methods are not supported.
@param { boolean } isStatic - Whether the method is a static method.

parameters.说明: Name of the method. Read-only methods are not supported.
Whether the method is a static method.

节点.功能描述: Replaces a method of a class object with another function. After the replacement, only the new function logic is executed. The final return value is the return value of the new function. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } methodName - Name of the method. Read-only methods are not supported.
@param { boolean } isStatic - Whether the method is a static method.
@param { Function } instead - Function to be used replacement.

parameters.说明: Name of the method. Read-only methods are not supported.
Whether the method is a static method.

节点.功能描述: Provide the ability to decode binary streams into strings. The supported encoding types include: utf-8, iso-8859-2, koi8-r, macintosh, windows-1250, windows-1251, gbk, gb18030, big5, utf-16be, utf-16 le, etc.
Constructor used to create a StringDecoder instance. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types;
注释信息: @param { string } [encoding] - Encoding type of the input data. The default value is utf-8.

parameters.说明: string } [encoding] - Encoding type of the input data. The default value is utf-8.

节点.功能描述: Returns a decoded string, Any incomplete multi-byte characters at the end of Uint8Array are filtered out from the returned string and stored in an internal buffer for the next call. decoding is performed normally. If the input is of the string type, decoding is performed in the original path. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types;
注释信息: @param { string | Uint8Array } chunk - String to decode. Decoding is performed based on the input encoding type. If the input is of the Uint8Array type,

parameters.说明: String to decode. Decoding is performed based on the input encoding type. If the input is of the Uint8Array type,

节点.return_description: Returns a decoded string.

节点.功能描述: Ends the decoding process and returns any remaining input stored in the internal buffer as a string. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types;
注释信息: @param { string | Uint8Array } [chunk] - String to decode. The default value is undefined.
@returns { string } Returns any remaining input stored in the internal buffer as a string.

parameters.说明: string | Uint8Array } [chunk] - String to decode. The default value is undefined.

节点.return_description: Returns any remaining input stored in the internal buffer as a string.

节点.功能描述: Get stack trace information for the main thread, returning up to 64 call frames This interface may impact main thread performance – use with caution.
注释信息: @returns { string } Return a stack trace of main thread.
节点.return_description: Return a stack trace of main thread.

节点.功能描述: Provides an interface that can be implemented for releasing a resource which is managed by developers through a developer-defined callback.
The developer-defined callback used to release resources.
注释信息: @param { T } heldValue - The value to pass to the finalizer.

parameters.说明: The value to pass to the finalizer.

节点.功能描述: A cleaner for releasing resources managed by developers through a developer-defined callback.
Register objects that release resources managed by developers.
注释信息: @param { AutoFinalizer<T> } obj - The object is registered to the cleaner.
@param { T } heldValue - The value to pass to the finalizer.

节点.功能描述: To provide developers with maintenance and testing capabilities for the ArkTS virtual machine.
To turn on or off the multi-thread detection switch. If enabled is true, turn on the switch, If enable is false, turn off the switch. multi-thread detection switch.
注释信息: @param { boolean } enabled - The boolean flag to indicate whether to turn on or off

parameters.说明: The boolean flag to indicate whether to turn on or off
